title: Simple QoL
description: This plugin aims to add simple quality of life recipes and tweaks to minecraft to make survival a little more enjoying than plain vanilla.
body:
This plugin aims to add simple quality of life recipes and tweaks to minecraft to make survival a little more enjoying than plain vanilla. 

<details>
    <summary>List of tweaks</summary>

### Added Crafting Recipes
* Crying Obsidian
* Chainmail armor
* Trident
* Grass block
* Glowstone
* Glow Lichen
* Experience Bottle
* Nametag
* Mycelium
* (Alternative recipe to) Black Dye

### Furnace Recipes
* Rotten flesh -> Leather
* Prismarine -> Dark Prismarine
* Tropical Fish -> Cooked Cod

### Stonecutter Recipes
* Packed Ice -> Ice
* Blue Ice -> Ice

### Tweaks
* Better Totems
  - Totems will be consumed even if a player isn't holding it in their offhand.
* Shearable Item Frames
  - Item Frames can be made invisible by right clicking them with a shear (and vice versa).
* World Time
  - Shift-Right clicking an item frame containing a clock will display the world time.
</details>

#### Please note that the plugin is still in beta, so recipes and tweaks *may* change in later versions~!
